title: Is skopeo has any packages that can be imported?
body:
I want to import skopeo to my project so as to use skopeo abilities, but I can't find an elegent way to import skopeo
Does skopeo have plans to export packages for use like buildah?

comments.body:
> I want to import skopeo to my project so as to use skopeo abilities, but I can't find an elegent way to import skopeo Does skopeo have plans to export packages for use like buildah?

Thanks for reaching out.  Skopeo is not intended to be used a Go library.  Instead it suggest to use `github.com/containers/image`. Skopeo is really just a (comparatively thin) layer around the image library.

> 

Oh, thanks a lot., I'll turn to use `github.com/containers/image` directly as you said
Excellent!  The Skopeo code can serve as a nice example of how to use c/image.
